page_header.label: LEGAL
page_header.title: Privacy Policy
page_header.description: How ZKIRA Pay handles your data.

sections.heading: Introduction
paragraphs: ZKIRA Pay ("we", "us", "our") operates the zkira.xyz website and related services. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our website and protocol.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
paragraphs: We are committed to protecting your privacy and minimizing data collection:
list: We do NOT collect wallet addresses, private keys, or transaction data
Website analytics: Anonymous, privacy-respecting analytics via Plausible Analytics
Contact form submissions: Name, email address, and message content

sections.heading: Blockchain Data
paragraphs: All transactions occur on the Solana blockchain, which is a public ledger. ZKIRA uses stealth addresses to protect recipient identity while maintaining the transparency of blockchain technology.
We do not store or index on-chain transaction data on our servers. All transaction data exists solely on the Solana blockchain.

sections.heading: How We Use Information
paragraphs: We use the limited information we collect to:
list: Improve our services and user experience
Respond to your inquiries and support requests
Send protocol updates and announcements (opt-in only)
Understand website usage patterns through anonymous analytics

sections.heading: Third-Party Services
list: Solana RPC providers for blockchain connectivity
Plausible Analytics for privacy-respecting website analytics (no Google Analytics)
additionalParagraphs: We do not sell, rent, or share your data with third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.heading: Cookies
paragraphs: We use minimal cookies, only essential ones for website functionality. We do not use tracking cookies or advertising cookies.

sections.heading: Data Retention
paragraphs: Contact form data is retained for 12 months to allow us to respond to inquiries and provide support. Analytics data is anonymous and aggregated, with no personal identifiers.

sections.heading: Your Rights
paragraphs: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, please contact us at privacy@zkira.xyz.

sections.heading: Children's Privacy
paragraphs: Our services are not directed at children under 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 18.

sections.heading: Changes to Policy
paragraphs: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last Updated" date.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: For questions about this privacy policy or our data practices, please contact us at privacy@zkira.xyz.
